title: Agent
description: A person, organization, software agent, or other entity involved with a resource

category.title: category
category.description: The type of the agent that makes the item available

name.title: name
examples: U.S. Department of Commerce Data Stewardship Office

_oldDocs.rationale: The addition of the foaf:Agent class in DCAT-US 3.0 serves a dual purpose. Firstly, it allows for the representation of software agents, aligning with modern data automation needs. Secondly, it acts as an abstract class for both foaf:Person and org:Organization, promoting consistency and interoperability while simplifying resource descriptions within the dataset catalog.
